title: harness-release
description: Harness version identity, SEPARATE from manifest.json (the pure integrity map). Machine-written by the release toolkit on an explicit release cut; read FRESH by provenance stamps so a mid-session upgrade is reflected. On the dev channel kit_digest may be empty and is recomputed live from the working tree. Written to harness/release.json.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this release.json shape

harness_version.description: SemVer of the harness (e.g. 1.2.3, 1.2.3-rc.1, or 0.0.0-dev for an uncut checkout)

kit_digest.description: sha256 of manifest.json = fingerprint of the whole tree state. Empty on a dev checkout (recomputed live); pinned on a real release.

manifest_files_count.description: Number of files in manifest.json at cut time; optional

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 cut time; null on a dev checkout (set only by an explicit release cut)
